changelog: Rebar/reinforcement: 62 new MCP tools across Revit 2023-2027 (bar types/shapes/hooks/cover discovery, shape- and curve-driven bar creation, layout, hooks/terminations, area/path/fabric reinforcement, couplers/splices/constraints, bending details, rounding, numbering, settings). New get_element_solid_geometry tool returns an element's real solid extents AND cross-section shape (circular/rectangular) so rebar is placed inside the actual armable body, not the bounding box. Fixes: default reinforcement-type created inside the transaction; area/path member count read after regeneration; layout numeric validation against the documented SetLayoutAs* contract (number 1..1002, spacing/arrayLength). All 5 plugin targets (R23-R27) + server build clean; 266 unit tests pass.
